course.name_zh: 敏捷 × AI 工作坊 — 怎样提高你的『敏捷性』
course.name_en: Agile × AI Workshop — How to Raise Your Agility in the AI Era
course.tagline_zh: AI 转型不是装工具，是换工作方式。敏捷，就是那套能让 AI 真正跑起来的『工作操作系统』。
course.tagline_en: AI transformation is not about installing tools — it's about changing how you work. Agile is the operating system that lets AI actually run.
course.audience_zh: 所有正在做 AI 转型的职场人 — 个人贡献者 / Manager / Leader 都适用，不限行业、不限岗位、不需要编程基础。
course.audience_en: Anyone going through AI transformation at work — ICs, managers, leaders. No coding required.
